appliedUpdates.description: MFA verification contract note already documented in api.md: MFA verification must reuse POST /auth/login with original payload plus mfaCode/recoveryCode

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note about the PUBLIC_ROUTES vs SKIP_REFRESH_ROUTES pattern: PUBLIC_ROUTES skip auth header injection, SKIP_REFRESH_ROUTES skip 401 retry-with-refresh logic. This helps future workers understand the distinction when modifying API routing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The pattern is documented in src/lib/api.ts lines 41-59 but not in AGENTS.md. This is a convention that workers modifying auth/API wiring should understand.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: frontend-contract-worker skill should mention checking vite.config.ts proxy config and Origin header handling when backend CORS blocks browser-based validation during manual verification. The worker discovered this issue and added an Origin header override to the vite proxy.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: During auth-session-company-context-alignment implementation, the worker found that backend only accepts same-origin requests. The fix was adding headers.Origin override in vite.config.ts lines 86-92. This is a common dev environment issue.
